label: Portal shimmer — swirling spiral arms + inward-pulsing concentric rings
notes: Replaced surface-normal specular shimmer with polar-coordinate portal spiral. 3 arms: sin(aW*3 + rW*16 + t*2.8) — '+t' means inward pull. Concentric rings: sin(rW*26 + t*5.0). FBM domain warp (0.40 strength) breaks mechanical symmetry. Fade: smoothstep(0.70, 0.05, r) so portal fills most of frame. Color: deep teal (0.06,0.28,0.48) → aqua-white (0.65,0.90,0.97). Shimmer now reads as portal aperture not water surface.

operations.note: Full rewrite — polar coordinate spiral portal replaces surface normal specular
operations.before: domain-warped wave height function + Phong specular dot(normal, vec3(0,0,1))^42
